# SeraAI Environment Variables
# Copy this file as '.env' in the same directory

# Gemini API Key (get one free at https://aistudio.google.com/)
API_KEY=""

# Local LLM Token (LM Studio authentication, optional) 
LOCAL_TOKEN=""

# Discord Bot Token (optional, only if ENABLE_DISCORD_BOT = True in bot_config.py)
DISCORD_TOKEN=""

# OpenCode API Key (optional, alternative cloud provider)
OPENCODE_KEY=""
